title: Expensive Women
writer: Wilson Collison, Harvey F. Thew, Raymond Griffith
actors: Dolores Costello, H.B. Warner, Warren William
plot: "Expensive Women" is a 1931 Pre-Code talking film drama directed by silent-film veteran Hobart Henley and stars Dolores Costello. It was Costello's final film as a leading lady and star for Warners, with which she had been since 1...
